title: rubus × legrandianus
intro: Rubus × legrandianus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). It has been found to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × legrandianus include its potential to aid in the management of cardiovascular disease, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × legrandianus include infusions, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its potential health benefits.
